name: token-cost
description: Estimate the floor (self-) cost of a self-hosted LLM token: electricity + hardware amortization. Measures power (nvidia-smi) and tok/s on the server, asks for tariff and hardware cost, prints cost per 1M input/output tokens. Not the market API price.

interface.shortDescription: Floor cost of a self-hosted LLM token: electricity + hardware amortization.
